title: AN ACT RENAMING BAY BOULEVARD LOCATED IN PASAY CITY, EXTENDING UP TO PARAÃAQUE CITY, AS JOSE W. DIOKNO BOULEVARD

chunks.text:
H. No. 5891 / 103 OG No. 38, 5966 (Sept. 17, 2007)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9468, May 15, 2007 ]

AN ACT RENAMING BAY BOULEVARD LOCATED IN PASAY CITY, EXTENDING UP TO PARAÃAQUE CITY, AS JOSE W. DIOKNO BOULEVARD

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The approximately 4.38 kilometer stretch of road located in the cities of Pasay and Parañaque, which is now known as Bay Boulevard and which begins at its intersection with Roxas Boulevard where Gil Puyat Avenue terminates (specifically from Roxas Boulevard where Gil Puyat Avenue terminates (specifically from Roxas Boulevard heading west past the World Trade Center, veering south past the GSIS Complex to Libertad Channel - 1.45 kilometers) passing through CBP 1 Island "A" (libertad Channel to Redemptorist Channel - 1.28 kilometers) and CBP 1 Island "C" and "C" (Redemptionist Channel to Asiaworld Property - 1.65 kilometers), is hereby renamed as Jose W. Diokno Boulevard.

SEC. 2. The Department of Public Works and Highways is hereby directed to place the appropriate street names and markers along Jose W. Diokno Boulevard.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect immediately upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

(Sgd.) MANNY VILLAR

Speaker of the House of Representatives

President of the Senate

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on December 20, 2006 and February 19, 2007 respectively.

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: MAY 15 2007

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
